cards.name: Binder Filter
cards.text: Prototype for: once each turn, discard 1 card, then draw 1 card.

cards.name: Last-Word Brawler
cards.text: When this dies, it deals damage equal to its attack to your opponent.

cards.name: Ravenous Baloth
cards.text: At the start and end of your turn, this deals 1 damage to you.

cards.name: Toolfed Scrapper
cards.text: When played, if you control a tool, this gets +1/+1 and you gain 1 life.

cards.name: Lifebloom Glider
cards.text: Flying. Activated: pay 1 focus to gain 1 life.

cards.name: Gravepath Guide
cards.text: Activated: pay 1 focus to recover 1 card from your discard.

cards.name: Refund Beast
cards.text: When this dies, gain 4 focus this turn.

cards.name: Grove Stipend
cards.text: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Verdant Midrange focus this turn.

cards.name: Focus Page
cards.text: Activated once each turn: gain 1 focus. This cannot attack after using that ability this turn.

cards.name: Leafwing Scout
cards.text: Prototype for: 1/1 flying.

cards.name: Growing Duelist
cards.text: Whenever this deals combat damage to your opponent, it gets +1/+1.

cards.name: Grip Punisher
cards.text: Deal 1 damage to your opponent for each card in their hand.

cards.name: Lattice Stipend
cards.text: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Lantern Control focus this turn.

cards.name: Perfect Search
cards.text: Prototype for: search your library for a card and put it into your hand.

cards.name: Borrowed Turn
cards.text: Prototype for: take an extra turn after this one.

cards.name: Focus Tax
cards.text: Prototype for: your opponent gains 1 less focus next turn.

cards.name: Curiosity Harness
cards.text: Whenever this deals combat damage to your opponent, draw 1 card.

cards.name: Scrying Page
cards.text: Prototype for: 1/1 that looks at the top card and may discard it.

cards.name: Shield Protocol
cards.text: Prototype for: target a threat; it gains 3 health.

cards.name: Table Freeze
cards.text: Prototype for: opposing threats currently on the field cannot attack next turn.

cards.name: Action Denial
cards.text: Prototype for: negate an opponent action.

cards.name: Summon Denial
cards.text: Prototype for: negate an opponent threat as it is played.

cards.name: Focus Gargoyle
cards.text: Prototype for: 0/4 that gets +1 attack for each focus you have.

cards.name: Lockdown Tag
cards.text: Prototype for: target a creature; it cannot attack.

cards.name: Preordain Notes
cards.text: Prototype for: look at the top card, choose whether to discard it, then draw 1.

cards.name: Uncounterable Drake
cards.text: Prototype for: 4/5 flying; your spells cannot be countered.

cards.name: Glass-Cannon Sprinter
cards.text: Fast. At the end of your turn, destroy this.

cards.name: Redline Stipend
cards.text: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Redline Aggro focus this turn.

cards.name: Smash the Toolbox
cards.text: Prototype for: destroy target tool.

cards.name: Draw Punisher
cards.text: Whenever your opponent draws a card, this deals 1 damage to them.

cards.name: Live Wire
cards.text: Deal 2 damage to any target.

cards.name: Taunting Sprinter
cards.text: Prototype for: 3/2 fast that can stop a threat from attacking next turn.

cards.name: Impact Mauler
cards.text: Fast. Whenever this deals combat damage to your opponent, it deals 4 damage to them.

cards.name: Overdrive Titan
cards.text: Prototype for: 7/7 piercing with an additional-cost mode that grants +7/+7 and invincible.

cards.name: Pure-Grave Spark
cards.text: Prototype for: deal 1 damage to any target; if your discard is all aggro cards, deal 6 instead.

cards.name: Mirror Box Rare
cards.text: Prototype for: on play, give a random threat in your hand +2/+1 and -1 cost, then create a copy.

cards.name: Topdeck Gambler
cards.text: Prototype for: 1/1 that mills the top card; big hits gain focus, misses gain temporary power.

cards.name: One-Drop Reactor
cards.text: Once each turn, when you play a 1-cost card, deal 2 damage to your opponent.

cards.name: Blanking Agent
cards.text: Prototype for: on play, target an opponent card; it loses its ability.

cards.name: Reset Judge
cards.text: Prototype for: reset all cards to their original power and health.

cards.name: Graveyard Coward
cards.text: When played, if your opponent has 3+ cards in their discard, this loses 4 attack.

cards.name: Ticket Printer
cards.text: Prototype for: on reveal, shuffle two 1-cost 6/1 cards into your deck.

cards.name: Zero-Power Rally
cards.text: Prototype for: all cards with 0 base attack gain 3 attack.

cards.name: Ahead-on-Board Colossus
cards.text: Prototype for: 6/6 that costs 4 less if your cards have more power than your opponent's.

cards.name: Big-Spell Mascot
cards.text: Prototype for: 0/1 that gains +2 attack for each card costing 4 or more you control.

cards.name: Chaotic Reprint
cards.text: Prototype for: destroy a target card, then create 2 copies under its owner's control.

cards.name: Attendance Colossus
cards.text: Prototype for: 15/15 that cannot be played if you played a card last turn.
